blended.narrative: Mont-Tremblant is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,969 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
